name: discover-feature-mode
responsibility: Modifications to discover.md for feature mode. Implements per-stage conditional behavior: mode detection at entry, Layer 1 skip, Layer 2 inheritance, philosophy skip + conflict detection, regression guard generation, UI Taste adherence mode, and feature artifact isolation.

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: discover.md Step 0 is extended with mode detection before idea collection

output_schema.description: ModeContext written to conversation context, driving all subsequent stage behavior
Layer 1 is skipped entirely. Direction is implicitly 'extend existing project'.
Layer 2 with inherited tech stack, NFR, philosophy from profile. Only feature-incremental definitions collected. Domain model presented alongside existing (REQ-008-AC-1).
Layer 3 with regression guard ACs auto-generated for requirements touching existing modules.

input_schema.description: mode=feature context + profile ui_taste / existing design system

output_schema.description: UI Taste in adherence mode (creativeRange: REFINE) reading existing design DNA.
All artifacts written to specs/features/feat-xxx/ instead of specs/. References profile by path.

nfr_constraints.other: Greenfield mode must remain identical to current behavior (INV-001). Feature mode branches are additive, not replacements. discover.md is already 30K — mode branches should be concise to avoid Agent execution instability (pre-mortem #3).
